developer.title: API Integration
developer.description: Integrate Pave's payment API into your application with just a few lines of code. Our RESTful API is designed for developers who want to move fast.

company.title: Global Payment
company.description: Accept payments from customers worldwide without currency conversion fees. Process transactions across borders seamlessly with support for multiple currencies and payment methods.

company.title: Instant Checkout
company.description: Provide your customers with a lightning-fast checkout experience. One-click payments reduce cart abandonment and increase conversion rates instantly.

company.title: Integration
company.description: Connect Pave with your existing tools and platforms effortlessly. Pre-built integrations with popular e-commerce platforms, accounting software, and business tools.

company.title: Secure Infrastructure
company.description: Enterprise-grade security with advanced fraud detection. Your transactions are protected with bank-level encryption and real-time monitoring.
